comments.post_body:
🚦 Exciting Milestone at Soham System Solutions! 🚦

With the blessings of Lord Ganesha, my parents, and elders, I’m happy to share that Soham System Solutions has officially stepped into product innovation with the launch of our SigWiz suite of traffic management products.
Traffic management is a global challenge. When we looked closely, we realized traditional traffic equipment is often complicated to set up, operate, and maintain. That’s where we saw an opportunity — to design products that are simpler, smarter, and more reliable.
This journey wasn’t easy. Along the way, we:

• Built a world-class team in software, PCB design, video analytics, industrial design, and manufacturing
• Developed a strong supplier ecosystem delivering on-time, high-quality components
• Created innovative, patent-pending solutions tailored for real-world challenges

We are now ready to collaborate with governments, municipalities, civil contractors, infrastructure companies, technology partners — and anyone looking to improve traffic management with robust, scalable solutions.
🔗 Explore a glimpse here: https://lnkd.in/d-4xe6H8

 📍 For the full experience, visit us at Stall A-11, RAHSTA Expo , Jio World Convention Center, Mumbai (3–4 Sept)

🙏 I would deeply appreciate if you could share this post with people in your network who are in infrastructure, smart cities, or traffic management. If you know someone in this space, an introduction would mean a lot.
#MadeInIndiaMadeForTheWorld #ProudlyMadeInIndia
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to the launch of Soham System Solutions' SigWiz suite of traffic management products, a new innovation in product development that aims to simplify traffic management globally. The commenter is likely congratulating or showing interest in this milestone achievement.

comments.post_body:
Today, Atobic officially turns one.

Feeling deeply grateful to every candidate who took a chance on us, every teammate who chose to build with care, our advisors for their steady counsel, our families for constant support and encouragement, and our customers who trusted us when we were just getting started.

A few lessons from year one: trust compounds faster than anything else, early hires shape the soul of the company (and we were incredibly fortunate), and every person who reached out, introduced, or helped along the way truly mattered.

Excited for what lies ahead. Thank you for being part of our journey!

cc: Raj kamal
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to Atobic's one-year anniversary post, where the company is expressing gratitude to those who have supported them and sharing lessons learned from their first year. The commenter is likely offering congratulations or well-wishes for the company's future.

comments.comment_body: Mayur Kale thanks Mayur! Hope all’s well.

Honored to step into the role of Associate Director at #WissenTechnology!
Thankful to the mentors who believed in my potential and gave their invaluable support throughout- Anurag Sinha, Sunil Palrecha, Mohan Mummadi, Shravan Bhosale.
Big shout out to my amazing team — your relentless effort and commitment have been the real driving force behind this.
This is just the beginning. Excited for what’s Next!!
#Leadership #Gratitude #Promotion #WissenTechnology #Teamwork #AssociateDirector

🌟 Grateful & Honored! 🌟

I'm thrilled to share that I’ve received the STAR Award from Ciklum India!

This recognition means a lot to me and serves as a reminder that dedication, teamwork, and passion never go unnoticed. A huge thank you to my amazing team and mentors who continuously inspire and support me. 🙌

Looking forward to continuing this journey of growth, innovation, and collaboration at Ciklum! 🚀

#Gratitude #STARAward #CiklumIndia #Teamwork #Recognition #CareerMilestone

comments.post_body:
Hello Connections,

I just would like to inform you, I am relocated to Redmond US, but in same team with different challenges. 

When I relook my career so far, almost in every couple of years I worked on some decent size projects, I completed and moved on. This gave me lots of learnings, connections, exposure, accomplishment and most importantly hit refresh moments to choose something to carry forward and something to drop resiliently. I had started my journey from very rural background with different believe system and now I am enjoying these transformations and trying to take best of worlds I went through. Excited to my journey ahead. 

I am very thankful to my wonderful company #microsoft, all my leaders and my team for all the support, hard work and believe. Thanks for your support and blessings.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the post author on their relocation to Redmond, US, and expressing admiration for their career journey and resilience. The post author is sharing their personal and professional growth, and expressing gratitude to their company, Microsoft, and team for their support.

Excited to share that I'm now at PhonePe!

It was an exhilarating 5! years at PubMatic, and I'll treasure the connections I made.

I've only just started at PhonePe, but I'm already in awe of the talented team and colleagues, and am excited about everything I'll be learning from them over the next years. Should be quite the adventure.

I am glad to share that my patent application which was submitted to USPTO during my time at #vmware  is granted. #thankyou with gratitude to all the co-author of the patent!

One more patent got approved by USPTO. Congratulation to all co-inventors Shivraj Sonawane Sarat Chandra Annadata Sachin Vaidya and Shantanu Kulkarni. So many updates/modifications/revisions.., but glad that we were able to get this through. Gratitude 🙏
#vmware #nsx VMware Carbon Black VMware #innovation
